ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَأَلَ سَآئِلُۢ بِعَذَابٍ وَاقِعٍ ١
ayahs.translation: A supplicant asked for a punishment bound to happen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِّلْكَـٰفِرِينَ لَيْسَ لَهُۥ دَافِعٌ ٢
ayahs.translation: To the disbelievers; of it there is no preventer.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ذِى ٱلْمَعَارِجِ ٣
ayahs.translation: [It is] from Allāh, owner of the ways of ascent.

ayahs.textUthmani: تَعْرُجُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيْهِ فِى يَوْمٍ كَانَ مِقْدَارُهُۥ خَمْسِينَ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَعْرُجُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيْهِ فِى يَوْمٍ كَانَ مِقْدَارُهُۥ خَمْسِينَ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ ٤
ayahs.textIndopak: تَعۡرُجُ الۡمَلٰٓٮِٕكَةُ وَ الرُّوۡحُ اِلَيۡهِ فِىۡ يَوۡمٍ كَانَ مِقۡدَارُهٗ خَمۡسِيۡنَ اَلۡفَ سَنَةٍ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: The angels and the Spirit [i.e., Gabriel] will ascend to Him during a Day the extent of which is fifty thousand years.
ayahs.transliteration: Ta'rujul malaaa'ikatu war-Roohu ilaihi fee yawmin kaana miqdaaruhoo khamseena alfa sanah

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱصْبِرْ صَبْرًا جَمِيلاً ٥
ayahs.translation: So be patient with gracious patience.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُمْ يَرَوْنَهُۥ بَعِيدًا ٦
ayahs.translation: Indeed, they see it [as] distant,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنَرَٮٰهُ قَرِيبًا ٧
ayahs.translation: But We see it [as] near.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ تَكُونُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ كَٱلْمُهْلِ ٨
ayahs.translation: On the Day the sky will be like murky oil,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَكُونُ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَٱلْعِهْنِ ٩
ayahs.translation: And the mountains will be like wool,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا يَسْــَٔلُ حَمِيمٌ حَمِيمًا ١٠
ayahs.translation: And no friend will ask [anything of] a friend,

ayahs.textUthmani: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمْ ۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلْمُجْرِمُ لَوْ يَفْتَدِى مِنْ عَذَابِ يَوْمِئِذٍۭ بِبَنِيهِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمْ‌ۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلْمُجْرِمُ لَوْ يَفْتَدِى مِنْ عَذَابِ يَوْمِئِذِۭ بِبَنِيهِ ١١
ayahs.textIndopak: يُّبَصَّرُوۡنَهُمۡ​ؕ يَوَدُّ الۡمُجۡرِمُ لَوۡ يَفۡتَدِىۡ مِنۡ عَذَابِ يَوۡمِٮِٕذٍۢ بِبَنِيۡهِۙ‏

words.translation: They will be made to see each other

ayahs.translation: They will be shown each other. The criminal will wish that he could be ransomed from the punishment of that Day by his children.
ayahs.transliteration: Yubassaroonahum; ya-waddul mujrimu law yaftadee min 'athaabi yawma'ithim bibaneeh

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَصَـٰحِبَتِهِۦ وَأَخِيهِ ١٢
ayahs.translation: And his wife and his brother

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفَصِيلَتِهِ ٱلَّتِى تُــْٔوِيهِ ١٣
ayahs.translation: And his nearest kindred who shelter him.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ ١٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَنۡ فِى الۡاَرۡضِ جَمِيۡعًا ۙ ثُمَّ يُنۡجِيۡهِۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And whoever is on earth entirely [so] then it could save him.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-man fil ardi jamee'an summa yunjeeh

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّآ‌ۖ إِنَّهَا لَظَىٰ ١٥
ayahs.translation: No! Indeed, it is the Flame [of Hell],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: نَزَّاعَةً لِّلشَّوَىٰ ١٦

words.translation: of the skin of the head

ayahs.translation: A remover of exteriors.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَدْعُواْ مَنْ أَدْبَرَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ ١٧
ayahs.translation: It invites he who turned his back [on truth] and went away [from obedience]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَمَعَ فَأَوْعَىٰٓ ١٨
ayahs.translation: And collected [wealth] and hoarded.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ خُلِقَ هَلُوعًا ١٩
ayahs.translation: Indeed, mankind was created anxious:

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلشَّرُّ جَزُوعًا ٢٠
ayahs.translation: When evil touches him, impatient,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلْخَيْرُ مَنُوعًا ٢١
ayahs.translation: And when good touches him, withholding [of it],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ ٢٢
ayahs.translation: Except the observers of prayer -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ دَآئِمُونَ ٢٣
ayahs.translation: Those who are constant in their prayer

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّذِينَ فِىٓ أَمْوَٲلِهِمْ حَقٌّ مَّعْلُومٌ ٢٤
ayahs.translation: And those within whose wealth is a known right

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ ٢٥
ayahs.translation: For the petitioner and the deprived -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُصَدِّقُونَ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ ٢٦
ayahs.translation: And those who believe in the Day of Recompense

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ ٢٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ مِّنۡ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِمۡ مُّشۡفِقُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And those who are fearful of the punishment of their Lord -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّهِمْ غَيْرُ مَأْمُونٍ ٢٨
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the punishment of their Lord is not that from which one is safe -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِفُرُوجِهِمْ حَـٰفِظُونَ ٢٩
ayahs.translation: And those who guard their private parts

ayahs.textUthmani: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزْوَٰجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزْوَٲجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ ٣٠
ayahs.textIndopak: اِلَّا عَلٰٓى اَزۡوَاجِهِمۡ اَوۡ مَا مَلَـكَتۡ اَيۡمَانُهُمۡ فَاِنَّهُمۡ غَيۡرُ مَلُوۡمِيۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they are not to be blamed -
ayahs.transliteration: Illaa 'alaaa azwaajihim aw maa malakat aymaanuhum fa-innahum ghairu maloomeen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٲلِكَ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ ٣١
ayahs.textIndopak: فَمَنِ ابۡتَغٰى وَرَآءَ ذٰلِكَ فَاُولٰٓٮِٕكَ هُمُ الۡعٰدُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: But whoever seeks beyond that, then they are the transgressors -
ayahs.transliteration: Famanib taghaa waraaa'a thaalika fa-ulaaa'ika humul 'aadoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِأَمَـٰنَـٰتِهِمْ وَعَهْدِهِمْ رَٲعُونَ ٣٢
ayahs.translation: And those who are to their trusts and promises attentive.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِشَهَـٰدَٲتِهِمْ قَآئِمُونَ ٣٣
ayahs.translation: And those who are in their testimonies upright

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ يُحَافِظُونَ ٣٤
ayahs.translation: And those who [carefully] maintain their prayer:

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ مُّكْرَمُونَ ٣٥
ayahs.translation: They will be in gardens, honored.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَمَالِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ قِبَلَكَ مُهْطِعِينَ ٣٦
ayahs.translation: So what is [the matter] with those who disbelieve, hastening [from] before you, [O Muḥammad],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ عِزِينَ ٣٧
ayahs.translation: [To sit] on [your] right and [your] left in separate groups?

ayahs.textUthmani: أَيَطْمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُدْخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَيَطْمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِىٍٕ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُدْخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٍ ٣٨
ayahs.textIndopak: اَيَطۡمَعُ كُلُّ امۡرِىءٍ مِّنۡهُمۡ اَنۡ يُّدۡخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيۡمٍۙ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Does every person among them aspire to enter a garden of pleasure?
ayahs.transliteration: Ayatma'u kullum ri'im minhum any yudkhala jannata Na'eem

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّآ‌ۖ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُم مِّمَّا يَعْلَمُونَ ٣٩
ayahs.translation: No! Indeed, We have created them from that which they know.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ وَٱلْمَغَـٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ وَٱلْمَغَـٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَـٰدِرُونَ ٤٠
ayahs.textIndopak: فَلَاۤ اُقۡسِمُ بِرَبِّ الۡمَشٰرِقِ وَالۡمَغٰرِبِ اِنَّا لَقٰدِرُوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: So I swear by the Lord of [all] risings and settings that indeed We are able
ayahs.transliteration: Falaaa uqsimu bi-Rabbil mashaariqi wal-maghaaribi innaa laqaadiroon

ayahs.textUthmani: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيْرًا مِّنْهُمْ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيْرًا مِّنْهُمْ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ ٤١
ayahs.textIndopak: عَلٰٓى اَنۡ نُّبَدِّلَ خَيۡرًا مِّنۡهُمۡۙ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَسۡبُوۡقِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: To replace them with better than them; and We are not to be outdone.
ayahs.transliteration: Alaaa an nubaddila khairan minhum Wa-maa nahnu bi-masbooqeen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُواْ وَيَلْعَبُواْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُواْ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ ٤٢
ayahs.textIndopak: فَذَرۡهُمۡ يَخُوۡضُوۡا وَيَلۡعَبُوۡا حَتّٰى يُلٰقُوۡا يَوۡمَهُمُ الَّذِىۡ يُوۡعَدُوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised -
ayahs.transliteration: Fatharhum yakhoodoo Wa-yal'aboo hattaa yulaaqoo yawma-humul lathee yoo'adoon

ayahs.textUthmani: يَوْمَ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ سِرَاعًا كَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ نُصُبٍ يُوفِضُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ سِرَاعًا كَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ نُصُبٍ يُوفِضُونَ ٤٣
ayahs.textIndopak: يَوۡمَ يَخۡرُجُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡاَجۡدَاثِ سِرَاعًا كَاَنَّهُمۡ اِلٰى نُصُبٍ يُّوۡفِضُوۡنَۙ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: The Day they will emerge from the graves rapidly as if they were, toward an erected idol, hastening.
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma yakhrujoona minal ajdaasi siraa'an ka-anna-hum ilaa nusubiny yoofidoon

ayahs.textUthmani: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلَّذِى كَانُوا۟ يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ‌ۚ ذَٲلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلَّذِى كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ ٤٤
ayahs.textIndopak: خَاشِعَةً اَبۡصَارُهُمۡ تَرۡهَقُهُمۡ ذِلَّةٌ ؕ ذٰلِكَ الۡيَوۡمُ الَّذِىۡ كَانُوۡا يُوۡعَدُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. That is the Day which they had been promised.
ayahs.transliteration: Khaashi'atan absaaruhum tarhaquhum thillah; thaalikal yawmul lathee kaanoo yoo'adoon
